jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Orders - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: Temporibus autem quibusdam et aut officiis debitis aut rerum.

title_copy_139656055_881964363.jcr:title: How long does it take to ship my order?

content_copy_1154896_1941727276.text: Please allow additional processing time for special order and personalized products, as they are made just for you.

content_copy_1154896_1166605805.text:
When you add an item to your shopping bag, we estimate the processing time and standard shipping delivery date. Expedited shipping options are available at checkout. You will receive a shipment notification email when each item is shipped.

Orders with multiple items may ship at different times in separate boxes. To ensure that your items arrive in time for your event, refer to the estimated delivery dates quoted in your shopping bag, as many of our styles are made to order. We take great care to ensure the quality of each product and prepare it for shipping, and we appreciate your patience while we process your order.

Shipping Processing Times
STANDARD (ground)
Processing 3 days
Shipping 1-7 days
Time to delivery 4-10 business days
EXPEDITED (2 business days)
Processing 3 days
Shipping 2 business days
Time to delivery 5 business days
RUSH (next business day*)
Processing Same day*
Shipping If ordered by 12PM EST: same business day
If ordered after 12PM EST: next business day
Time to delivery 2 business days

content_355550726.text: *For orders placed Monday-Friday. Orders placed on Saturdays and Sundays will be processed and shipped on Mondays.

content_copy_1154896_1498680732.text:
Standard shipping fees are based on your order's value.*

Shipping Fees
Order Value $0 - $49.99 Cont. US AK/HI
Standard $10 $25
Expedited $25 $25
Rush $40 $40
Order Value $50 - $98.99    
Standard $15 $25
Expedited $25 $25
Rush $40 $40
Order Value $99+ for Diamond Members    
Standard Free* $25
Expedited $25 $25
Rush $40 $40

*Flat rate shipping offers can only be redeemed online at example.com and cannot be applied to any prior purchases or shipments outside the U.S. Shipping rates will be applied automatically at checkout based on the pre-tax purchase amount. Free shipping for Diamond Members on orders over $99 offer for any purchases valid in the contiguous U.S. only. Purchases shipped to AK and HI will be charged $25 flat rate shipping.

content_copy_1154896_51290045.text:
Our U.S. website ships to all 50 states. We do not ship to U.S. territories, PO boxes, or APO/FPO addresses.

We offer international shipping for select items. To check if an item can be shipped internationally, first click the flag in the site footer and choose your country and currency. Then as you shop, international availability will appear after you select a color and a size. Learn more by reading our International FAQs.

content_copy_1154896_2147249722.text: Shipping Protection is an optional service available at checkout safeguarding your order against loss, damage, or theft during delivery. If your order is cancelled before shipping, the Shipping Protection Fee ($4.99) will be refunded. Should your order be fulfilled in multiple shipments, only one shipping protection fee will incur. Shipping fee is subject to sales tax in select states.

content_copy_1154896_732436808.text: Sales tax is calculated during the checkout process and is based on existing local, state, and federal laws. For international orders, this includes applicable duties, taxes, and VAT as determined by the destination customs authority. Taxes will be specified at checkout prior to submitting your order.

title_copy_139656055.jcr:title: How do I make a tax exempt purchase?

content_copy_1154896.text: If you would like to make a tax exempt purchase, please send an email with your tax exempt ID number to davidscustomerservice@demo.com, and a customer service representative will be happy to assist you.

content.text:
After you check out online, you will receive a confirmation email with your order number, a summary of your purchase, and estimated processing and delivery times for each item.

If you have not received an order notification email, first check your spam folder and email settings. Still not seeing it? Text HELLO to 38201 and our virtual concierge can help.

title_copy.jcr:title: How do I track my order?

content_copy.text:
Once your order ships, you will receive a shipping confirmation email that includes a link to track your package. Here are some other ways to track your order, too:

If You Placed an Order at a Site A Store
When you place an order at one of our stores, you will be given an estimated delivery date. If you would like to check your order's status, call 1-844-400-3222 or text HELLO to 38201.

If You Have an Online Account
Log in to your account at the top of our website. Click My Orders or Order History for a list of current and past orders, then click the order number for order status and tracking information.

If You Checked Out as a Guest
Visit our Order Status page, enter your order number and the email address used to place the order, then select View Order for order status and tracking information. If your order does not appear, please contact Customer Service at 1-844-400-3222 or text HELLO to 38201.

Tracking will become available 24–48 hours after you receive your shipment confirmation email. If 48 hours have passed and you are still unable to track your order, text HELLO to 38201. If you have not received the shipment notification email within your estimated time frame, call 1-844-400-3222 or text HELLO to 38201.

title_copy_139656055_2051967149.jcr:title: How do I make a return?

content_copy_1154896_967113733.text: For details on making a return, please see our Returns & Exchanges FAQs.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Your Account - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium.

title.jcr:title: How do I add styles to my favorites?

content.text: Sign into your example.com account to start saving your favorites—a heart icon will appear in the upper right corner of your screen. As you browse the site, you'll see heart icons in the upper right corner of product photos. Click the heart on any item you love and it will be instantly added to your favorites list. If you change your mind, unclick the heart and the item will be removed from your favorites list.

title_copy.jcr:title: How do I access my favorites?

content_copy.text: Sign into your example.com account and a heart icon will appear in the upper right corner of your screen. Your favorites are here! Your favorites are also accessible in the My Account section.

content_copy_1154896262.text: After your appointment, you'll receive an email of your favorite styles from your stylist. If you do not receive the email, contact the store directly.

title_copy_139656055.jcr:title: How do I sign up for a Site A account?

content_copy_1154896.text: To sign up for a Site A account, click the person icon in the flyout navigation menu or at the top right of the homepage, then the log in/sign up button. You can either sign in with an existing Google or Facebook account or enter your first (given) name, last (family) name, an email address and create a password. A verification code will be sent to your email to confirm your account.

content_copy_1154896_325615452.text: Log in to your account. Under account details, update any information you'd like, then select Save.

content_copy_1154896_22143342.text: To request a password reset, call 1-844-400-3222 or text HELLO to 38201. You can also select Forgot Password on example.com.

title_copy_139656055_1013781184.jcr:title: How do I unsubscribe from email?

content_copy_1154896_294458944.text: You can unsubscribe from our email list by following the unsubscribe link at the bottom of any Site A email.

title_copy_139656055_217917567.jcr:title: How do I unsubscribe from text?

content_copy_1154896_1724658058.text:
Android users: Reply STOP to Site A text messages to immediately opt out. If you receive texts from multiple David’s phone numbers, please reply STOP to each.

iOS users: Delete the David’s Apparel conversation thread from your phone and you will receive a prompt asking if you want to stop receiving our texts.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Our Stores - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissimos ducimus.

content.text: Yes, we offer alterations in every store and can help you personalize your dress and get the perfect fit. In addition to event dresses, we offer alterations on companion dresses, party dresses, and almost any other garment in your wardrobe, even ones purchased elsewhere! Learn more about alterations at Site A or visit our alterations FAQ's.

content_copy_1154896262.text:
Along with helping you find your dream dress, our stores can work with you to accessorize your look, put together your apparel party, and alter garments.

We also offer special events at local stores, as well as virtual events so everyone can join the party!

content_copy_1154896.text:
In an effort to ensure your safety and the safety of our team members, we’re still taking some extra precautions and ask that you join us in these efforts and be patient with us as we navigate this together.

Masks
If you prefer your stylist wear a mask during your appointment, just let us know. Please check with your local store if you have questions. For international store policies, see our Canadian website and UK website.

Appointments
To best accommodate brides and apparel parties, we recommend that you book an appointment.

If you can’t make it to a store for any reason, virtual video appointments are available where you can invite as many friends and loved ones as you’d like to be a part of the experience!

Walk-Ins
Walk-ins are welcome in all of our stores. Each store has hundreds of gorgeous dresses and accessories that are available off the rack to try on and take home today!

content_copy_1154896_1266095987.text:
Yes, Site A appointments are completely free, and you can schedule appointments online.

To cancel a Site A appointment online - with a virtual or in-person stylist - sign into your Site A account or follow the instructions in your appointment confirmation email. If you prefer, call the store directly.

content_copy_1154896_52423035.text: We've partnered with The Black Tux to make sure everyone in your event party looks amazing! Learn about The Black Tux.

feature_card.bodyText: We're here to serve you, no appointments required! To best accommodate brides and parties, we recommend you book an appointment. We look forward to seeing you soon!

feature_card_copy.bodyText: If you can’t make it to a store for any reason, or are uncomfortable shopping in person due to COVID-19, virtual video appointments are also available—invite as many friends and loved ones as you’d like!

content_1747537251.text:
A: I recommend coming in as early as you can, and here’s why: You are the star of the show! The dress is one of the elements that provide direction for the entire event, and if you choose a gown early on in your journey, it will help everything else fall into place. The dress may even influence which venue you choose.

While some events take place within a few weeks, the average engagement lasts six months. We will meet any deadline you have—and help you customize your look for the most important day in your life.

BOOK APPOINTMENT

content_1747537251_c.text:
A: If you want a quieter experience, try to schedule an appointment during the day, Monday through Thursday. These are our quietest times in the stores, and we are able to offer our brides as much attention as they need.

If you choose to visit us on the weekends—I really can’t stress this enough—make an appointment. We can do a better job when we are expecting you!

Also, tell us how many people you are bringing along so we can better accommodate your fitting area. We recommend bringing your two most trusted friends or relatives to help you make the decision. Of course, we understand if you want to bring more—just let us know.

Our apparel appointments are 60 minutes long, and our stores have flexible hours to meet every schedule.

BOOK APPOINTMENT

item_1623944390045.cq:panelTitle: Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris.

content_1747537251_c.text:
A: I highly recommend making a event dress appointment. For most brides, this is the single biggest purchase they’ve made in their lives so far. We want to ensure you have all the support you need to make that decision, and an appointment helps us to provide you with the best possible service.

Buying a event gown is much different from buying a dress at your favorite store. A typical event dress takes 100 hours to create and may be embellished with beads, lace, sequins, and more. Because these highly detailed gowns are heavier than what you are used to wearing, they require extra assistance when trying them on.

Also, while knowing your size is helpful, it doesn’t always translate exactly to a event gown. Our well-trained stylists will help you choose a dress and suggest lingerie or foundation garments that complement the dress and accentuate your figure. Then, our alterations artisans will make sure you get a perfect fit.

Finally, it is important to note that almost every event dress will have to be altered. During your appointment, our alterations artisans will spend time with you to ensure a perfect, just-for-you fit.

LEARN ABOUT ALTERATIONS

A: Of course! Shopping for a apparel gown is just like your event—it is all about you and should reflect your personality. Some brides like to bring their friends and others like to go shopping by themselves, especially if they already have a clear idea of what they want.

We help many brides who choose to shop by themselves. We have expert stylists to assist you with your decision, and they will ensure that you walk out of the store confident, with the look that’s right for you.

SHOP EVENT DRESSES

item_1623944404288.cq:panelTitle: Praesent feugiat tellus eget velit fringilla, nec vehicula nisi vulputate.

content_1747537251_c.text:
A: Here is where I get to talk about what is especially great about David’s Apparel! We carry more than 120 styles in every store, and most of our styles are available in sizes 0–30. If we don’t have the exact style and size you want, we know that we can find something similar in the store that is representative of your vision and inspiration.

We recommend coming in to try on dresses to determine the appropriate size for the style you pick out. But if you want a special style or size, we would be delighted to order it (please note, this takes about eight weeks on average). We also have beautiful gowns that you can take home the same day.

SHOP EVENT DRESSES
A: Let’s be real—TV is for entertainment, and those shows play up the drama for ratings. Our store experience is different, as it is focused solely on helping you find your dream dress!

box_368998597.cq:panelTitle: Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum.

content_1747537251_c.text:
A: Every bride and apparel party is different, but there are a few constants when shopping for companion dresses.

We offer a free companion consultation with every apparel appointment so you can start thinking about how your apparel party will fit in with your look.

Some brides prefer to shop with one companion, choose a dress for the apparel party, and instruct the rest of the members which dress or dresses to order afterwards, either in-store or online. Others prefer to shop with their entire apparel party.

We recommend a store appointment for companion dress selection so your stylist can help you pick out the style, fabric, and color, then work with you and your party to ensure everything is ready in time for the event. After you’ve chosen the overall look, your companion can come try on dresses and find their sizes at any store when it’s convenient for them, no appointment necessary.

SHOP COMPANION DRESSES

A: With so many colors and styles, there are endless ways to coordinate your companion. Since some styles will need to be special ordered or altered, we recommend choosing the dresses for the apparel party as soon as you can, or five to six months in advance, if possible.

The good news is that David’s Apparel has plenty of inventory—so no matter how much time you have to plan, we can get the right look for your event and your party!

SHOP COMPANION DRESSES

A: You deserve a safe space to shop, so we’re taking some extra precautions due to COVID-19.

LEARN ABOUT STORE SAFETY

quote.quote: Our expert stylists will ensure that you walk out of the store confident, with the look that’s right for you.

jcr:content.pageTitle: FAQs: About the Company - Site A

content.text: Please check with your local store to find a apparel show near you.

content_copy.text:
To become a vendor, fill out the submission form, and we will review your application. Upon approval, your listing will be published and you will receive a welcome email and a link to your profile page.

For more information on our vendor participation, email vendorparticipation@demo.com.

content_copy_1154896262.text:
Yes. We partner with nonprofit organizations to provide monetary donations, merchandise, or services to those in need. Over the last 5 years, we have contributed more than $1 million to worthy causes.

To apply for a charitable donation from Site A, your organization must be classified as tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3) of the U.S. Internal Revenue Code. We are unable to provide assistance directly to individuals.

If your nonprofit organization is interested in applying for a donation from Site A, submit a request to mediarequests@demo.com.

Due to the volume of requests, we are not able to respond to every inquiry. We will contact you if we are able to fulfill your request or if we require further information.

content_copy_1154896.text: Site A is the largest and most successful apparel retailer in the country. We are looking for vendor partners in every store to provide services for events, such as photography, videography, transportation, reception, catering, linens, travel, and cosmetics. To become a Site A vendor partner or to inquire about the online and in-store marketing opportunities, please email vendorparticipation@demo.com.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: International Shipping - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: Praesent feugiat tellus eget velit fringilla, nec vehicula nisi vulputate.

content.text:
Through our partnership with Global-e, we provide an enhanced international shopping experience for our customers in select countries, with support for more coming soon. International shoppers will see product prices in their local currency, guaranteed order totals, cost-effective international shipping, and more.

To ship outside the U.S., click on the country flag icon at the bottom of the website and you will find a list of available shipping countries and shopping currencies to select. If you have questions or need help, please email davidscustomerservice@demo.com.

title_copy_1396560550.jcr:title: How much will my order cost?

content_copy_1154896.text:
During checkout your total costs will calculate and guarantee the lowest possible order total in your preferred currency, including all shipping costs from the U.S. to your selected international destination and any applicable duties, taxes, and VAT as determined by the destination customs authority. Exchange rates are checked and adjusted multiple times during a 24-hour period, so if you leave your shopping bag and return later to complete your transaction, the order total may change if the exchange rate has changed. There will never be any additional surprise costs billed upon delivery or due as C.O.D. charges.

Important notes: 

Shoppers who select to ship to Canada (CAD currency) will see prices on product pages that include duties. Shipping costs from the U.S. plus taxes and VAT will be calculated within the International Checkout.

Shoppers who select to ship to United Kingdom (GBP currency) will see prices on product pages that include duties and taxes. Shipping costs from the U.S. will be calculated within the International Checkout.

All other international shoppers will see the price only (in their selected currency) on product pages. Then the guaranteed total amount including shipping, duties, taxes, and VAT will be calculated within the International Checkout.

content_copy_1154896_1836746513.text: For international orders, estimated delivery times are based on processing time plus transit time. You can see estimated delivery time frames during checkout.

content_copy_1154896_684594736.text:
We accept the following credit cards and payment types on example.com:

  • American Express
  • Discover
  • MasterCard
  • Visa
  • Diners Club
  • PayPal

title_copy_139656055_1532696606.jcr:title: Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum.

content_copy_1154896_303578462.text: You can shop online and use our domestic shipping option. Click Shop U.S. at the bottom of the page. Your currency will not be converted and prices will remain in U.S. dollars (USD). Your shopping cart total will also remain in USD. Choose your domestic shipping method—standard, next day, or express delivery—and select Check Out. You can use any supported credit card to complete your transaction.

content_copy_1154896_535619114.text: Your credit card will be billed at the time your parcel(s) leave the U.S.

title_copy_139656055_1727307772.jcr:title: Curabitur pretium tincidunt lacus, nulla gravida orci a odio.

content_copy_1154896_521387682.text: Duty, customs tariffs and value-added tax (VAT) are set by the destination country and determined based on a combination of the country of origin or manufacturing of the goods being purchased, and the classification of that merchandise in accordance with a harmonized system adopted and used by the countries that Global-e supports. VAT rates are set by the destination country. You will be able to see the guaranteed total amount of applicable duty and tax/VAT for your order within International Checkout.

content_copy_1154896_1161044751.text:
Due to size and customs restrictions, some items available in the U.S. are not available for international shipment. You may see items on our site that note "This product is not eligible for international delivery," as these items may not be shipped to international customers.

During checkout we may remove an item from your shopping bag if we cannot fulfill that item to the specified shipping destination. If there are any items that cannot be exported from the U.S. and/or imported into your destination country, our partner Global-e will notify you during the global checkout process.

content_copy_1154896_743930815.text:
These items are not eligible for returns:

  • Personalized and dyed items
  • Perishables, swimsuits, and personal care items
  • Final sale items
  • Items with any tags removed

Read more about returns and exchanges.

content_copy_1154896_836879461.text: Notify us within 30 calendar days of receiving your merchandise. Send an email to davidscustomerservice@demo.com. For defective, damaged, or incorrect items, you will receive a refund for the purchase price plus shipping and handling fees once the item is returned. Then you can place a new order to receive a replacement.

title_copy_139656055_1724034707.jcr:title: How do I make my return?

content_copy_1154896_1315703868.text:
Should you need to return an item, please review the complete details of our return policy below to determine if any special conditions apply then contact us to get a Return Request Number.  

Send an email within 30 calendar days of receipt of your package to davidscustomerservice@demo.comwith the following:

  • Name  
  • Address  
  • Order number
  • The item number(s) and reason for return  

Please phrase this email in English.  

We will reply with where returns should be shipped, the amount you will be refunded, and the return package instructions.  

Our partner Global-e will provide you with a refund of the original eligible merchandise price and any duties, taxes and/or VAT originally paid on the returning item, in the same currency and using the same exchange rate as your original order. Shipping and handling fees will not be refunded. You will pay for shipping the returned item(s) to an international hub. Additional shipping and handling fees will apply to ship the return back to the U.S.; these charges will be deducted from the return amount.  

Returns will not be accepted without the Return Request Number, which expires 7 calendar days after you receive it. The item will not be accepted if it is returned after that time.

To ensure your return is quickly processed, we ask you to:

  • Securely pack all the items you are returning in a single parcel and ship to the address provided
  • Include a copy of the return authorization email in your parcel
  • Write your Return Request Number on the outside of the parcel

For your protection, please send your return prepaid via a shipping carrier that offers parcel tracking such as Federal Express, DHL or UPS. Please be sure to keep your receipt. We cannot guarantee refunds for returns sent via a non-trackable method.  

Credits are processed upon verification of the return. You will receive an email when your credit has been processed. Please allow up to 2 billing cycles for the return credit to appear on your credit card statement.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Ways to Pay - Site A

content.text:
Yes! We provide flexible options to help you say "yes" with confidence. Our payment choices include: 

Buy Now, Pay Later with Sezzle

  • Say “yes” now, pay later with Sezzle
  • Choose your flexible payment plan
  • Pay over time with Sezzle
  • Shop in-store and online with Sezzle!

Learn More

 

Pearl Pay As You Go

Reserve your dream style and pay the balance in installments.

  • 25% deposit
  • Take up to 60 days to pay in full
  • $75 minimum purchase
  • 10% fee for cancellation or nonpayment

****Available in stores only. 60-day plan for in-stock merchandise with a minimum purchase of $75, excluding sales tax. Pearl Pay As You Go requires a deposit of 25% of the merchandise total. A 10% forfeiture fee will be charged for any layaway that is returned to stock due to cancellation or nonpayment, unless otherwise required by state law.

content_copy.text:
In stores, we accept:

  • Cash

content_copy_1154896.text: Visit the Site A Credit Card account page to make a payment.

title_copy_139656055_1995877524.jcr:title: Can I use store credit as payment?

content_copy_1154896_206096450.text:
For credits issued prior to December 1, 2023, all gift cards and store credits have been cancelled and no longer contain value. For more information, call 1-844-400-3222.

For credits issued on or after December 4, 2023, all gift cards and store credits can be used in David’s Apparel US stores as payment for new purchases, subject to the terms and conditions contained thereon.

title_copy_139656055_1256325769.jcr:title: I have a gift card. Can I still use it?

content_copy_1154896_2002190929.text:
For gift cards issued prior to December 1, 2023, all gift cards and store credits have been cancelled and no longer contain value. For more information, call 1-844-400-3222.

For gift cards issued on or after December 4, 2023, all gift cards and store credits can be used in David’s Apparel US stores as payment for new purchases, subject to the terms and conditions contained thereon.

title_copy_139656055_1475690970.jcr:title: Can I still purchase a gift card?

content_copy_1154896_325615452.text: As of December 4, 2023, new gift cards are available for purchase and use in stores.

content_copy_1154896_294458944.text: If you are purchasing a made to order item, as indicated on the product detail page, shopping bag, and checkout, your form of payment will be charged at the time of order placement. You will be notified of this payment policy and asked to acknowledge it by checking a box upon checkout. The order will not be processed unless the payment policy is acknowledged.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Shopping for Dresses - Site A

jcr:content.pageTitle: Site A | Help | As You Shop

title.jcr:title: What size event dresses are available?

content.text: Site A offers event dresses in sizes 0–18 and 14W–30W, with standard and tall lengths, as well as petite sizes.

content_copy.text: Site A offers companion dresses in sizes 0–30, with standard and tall lengths.

content_copy_1154896262.text: We will work with your time frame to ensure you have an amazing look for your day. For more options, we recommend shopping as early as you can. Our FAQs About Appointments will give you a better idea of what to expect.

content_copy_1154896.text: On our website you'll find our complete collection of event dresses, companion dresses, and special occasion dresses. In every store, we have a broad assortment of event dresses, companion dresses, and occasion dresses, with many sizes and colors available to take home today. Selection varies by store, and if we do not have the style, size, or color you'd like in stock at your store, we'd be happy to order it for you.

content_copy_1154896_325615452.text: You'll find an array of celebration-ready shoes and accessories at Site A stores, from flip-flips and stilettos to barrettes and veils. For even more styles and expanded sizes, including wide width shoes, shop our shoe collection and accessories collection.

content_copy_1154896_22143342.text: Site A offers a range of styles and sizes in stock so companion can purchase them with no ordering delays. We also offer made to order companion dresses, generally shipped to the store within six to eight weeks.

content_copy_1154896_294458944.text: You can buy Site A dresses and take them home the same day. Each store has a selection of hundreds of gorgeous event dresses and companion dresses that are available off the rack to try on and take home today! If you don't find what you're looking for, we have more dresses available online and ready to ship in sizes and colors that'll arrive almost as fast as shopping off the rack.

content_copy_1154896_1724658058.text: When a selection is marked "made to order," that means we produce the selected size and color after you place your order. Made to order styles may take up to 26 weeks to arrive but are often delivered sooner. You'll see the expected delivery time in your shopping bag.

title_copy_139656055_1193307927.jcr:title: How do I find my size?

content_copy_1154896_2058236298.text: On the product page, select Size Guide to see the measurements for each size. Use the How to Measure Guide to measure yourself or book an appointment to get measured.

content_copy_1154896_2131352270.text:
Your receipt of an electronic or other form of order confirmation does not signify our acceptance of your order, nor does it constitute confirmation of our offer to sell. Site A reserves the right to accept or decline your order for any reason at any time. Site A reserves the right at any time after receipt of your order, without prior notice to you, to supply less than the quantity you ordered of any item.   

All orders must be paid in U.S. denomination and must obtain verification pre-approval with an acceptable method of payment. We may require additional verifications or information before accepting any order. If additional information is necessary, we will contact you via email at the email address provided on your order. Shipping and delivery timeframes quoted on the site will not begin until appropriate approval and verification of your order has been obtained.   

On occasion, your order or specific items in your order may be out of stock. We apologize for this situation and will notify you via email that your order/item has been cancelled. Please check back on our website soon, as regular-price inventory is updated daily and new products are added all the time. Inventory quantities are limited for Sale, Seasonal Sale, and Outlet items, and they are not replenished, so order early for the best selection.

content_copy_1154896_508476433.text:
In the event a product is listed at an incorrect price due to a display or typographical error, or an error in pricing information received from our suppliers or store partners, Site A shall have the right to refuse or cancel any orders placed for product listed at the incorrect price.   

Site A shall have the right to refuse or cancel any such orders whether or not the order has been confirmed and your credit card charged. If your credit card has already been charged for the purchase and your order is cancelled, Site A shall immediately issue a credit to your credit card account in the amount of your original charge.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Ways to Save - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum.
jcr:content.pageTitle: FAQs: Ways to Save - Site A

content.text: Head to the Exclusive Offers page to check out our current sales and promotions. You can also join Diamond Loyalty Program by David's for exclusive offers and gifts.

content_copy.text:
Enter your promo code at checkout, before payment. You will see the discount applied to your payment total. Certain restrictions may apply to items available for discount.

For Diamond Loyalty promo codes, you'll also be asked for your Diamond Loyalty number (the phone number you or your bride signed up with).

title_copy_1396560550.jcr:title: Can I use more than one promo code?

content_copy_1154896262.text: There is a limit of one promo code per item per order. For example, a dollar discount promo code cannot be combined with a free shipping promo code.

title_copy_139656055.jcr:title: What are your promo code policies?

content_copy_1154896.text:
Promotions are issued with expiration dates, while supplies last. Promotion dates cannot be extended for individual customers.

Dollar-off, percentage-off, and minimum purchase promotions are applied to the merchandise subtotal, before shipping charges and taxes have been applied.

Promotions may have requirements and discounts based on specific products or product combinations, minimum purchases, or maximum discounts. All requirements must be met to receive your discount.

If you return an item that was purchased with a promotion, you will be refunded only for the amount you paid (the price of the item less the promotion value).

If items are returned or cancelled, this may change or void discounts applied to your original order if it causes the merchandise subtotal to fall below the minimum promotional requirements.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Planning Your Event - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissimos ducimus.
jcr:content.pageTitle: FAQs: Planning Your Event - Site A

title.jcr:title: How do I take the event dress quiz?

content.text: Our Event Style Quiz is easy and fun! Discover your apparel style and receive personalized dress recommendations in six quick questions, then share your top looks.

title_copy.jcr:title: How do I create a free event registry?

content_copy.text:
Our partner MyRegistry makes it easy to create a universal registry with gifts from any online retailer, cash funds, even charitable contributions.

For more info on your registry and other planning tools, check out our free event planning toolkit.

content_copy_1154896_775465219.text: Click the Create New Task button in the upper right hand corner of your browser. You will be able to fill in the details of the task, assign to a collaborator, and get email reminders for your task.

content_copy_1154896262.text: You can edit or delete any task by clicking on Edit's pencil icon or Delete's trash can icon.

content_copy_1154896.text: Click the pencil icon to edit, then enter the email of the person you wish to assign this task. They'll get an email regarding the task, and you can breathe a sigh of relief.

title_copy_139656055_1163238177.jcr:title: How do I filter my event checklist?

content_copy_1154896_1836746513.text: You can filter by the status of the task, assigned month of the task, or task category on the left side of the checklist.

title_copy_139656055_1391360049.jcr:title: Vestibulum auctor dapibus neque, vivamus vel nulla eget eros elementum.

content_copy_1154896_2136542544.text: Edit your event date in Account Settings, located at the top of your checklist.

content_copy_1154896_684594736.text: Click the checkbox below your new date to automatically adjust your tasks.

content_copy_1154896_303578462.text: You can download or print your checklist at the bottom of the menu on the lefthand side.

content_copy_1154896_535619114.text: Edit your email preferences in Account Settings at the top of your checklist.

title_copy_139656055_1727307772.jcr:title: How do I create a free event website?

content_copy_1154896_521387682.text:
Our partner MyRegistry has beautiful templates to make it easy to share your love story, create a schedule of events, preview your progress, and manage RSVPs in one place.

For more info on your event website and other planning tools, check out our free event planning toolkit.

title_copy_139656055_1272620742.jcr:title: How do I create a vision board?

content_copy_1154896_178045242.text:
Create your dream event with our free vision board, then share it with your family and friends. You can also access your vision board on the go with our new Site A Planning app. 

For more info on your vision board and other planning tools, check out our free event planning toolkit.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Alterations - Site A
jcr:content.jcr:description: Nemo enim ipsam voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit.

title_copy_copy.jcr:title: What is Site A's alterations policy?

content_copy_copy_932770477.text: If our standard alterations on a garment purchased from David’s Apparel do not result in the fit you agreed upon at time of fitting, we will do another round of alterations. If our alterations damage a garment purchased from David’s Apparel, we will fix the damage or replace the garment. Because of the variability in construction, materials, and quality of garments purchased from third parties, we cannot extend this alterations policy to cover alterations on garments that were not purchased at David’s Apparel.

content.text:
Every one of our U.S. locations has on-site alterations artisans who know our dresses inside and out, from the unique construction to the carefully crafted details.

In addition to event dresses, companion dresses, and social occasion dresses purchased at our stores or website, our certified team of alteration pros is ready to alter almost any apparel, no matter where it was purchased!

content_copy.text:
The best way to determine how long alterations will take for your garment is to schedule an appointment with our alterations artisans. If you found your dream dress at David’s Apparel, we recommend making an appointment for your first fitting at the time of purchase.

For event dresses, an alterations artisan will work with you at your initial appointment to create a specific timeline based on your event date. Please allow 4 weeks between the first and final fittings. If you need your alterations before 4 weeks, please contact your local store.

For companion dresses, social occasion dresses, and all other garments, we can provide alterations within 2 weeks; however, a rush fee may apply. Contact your local store for availability.

title_copy_1396560550.jcr:title: How can I personalize my dress?

title_copy_139656055.jcr:title: What happens at the first fitting?

content_copy_1154896.text: First fittings take about an hour for event dresses and half an hour for companion or formal dresses. Most other garments will take a half hour or less. You'll try on your garment, and a specialist will pin it to show you the best alterations for an ideal fit. For event dresses with a train, you'll see bustle options.

title_copy_139656055_1251477561.jcr:title: What should I bring to my fittings?

content_copy_1154896_1049501022.text:
Women: To ensure the perfect fit, bring the bra, slip, shapewear, and shoes you plan to wear with your dress or garment. If you don’t have your undergarments yet, David’s Apparel offers foundation pieces and lingerie that pairs with every type of dress.

Men: Bring the shoes you plan to wear if you are having pants hemmed.

title_copy_139656055_1611006522.jcr:title: Who should I bring to my fitting?

content_copy_1154896_470027304.text: For brides with a gown featuring a long train, invite your maid of honor (or mom or trusted friend) to the final fitting so she can learn how to bustle your gown for the big day.

content_copy_1154896_16457073.text:
Our goal is to perfect the fit of your garment while staying within your budget. Pricing varies based on the complexity of the alterations, so we'll need to see you in the garment before we can provide a price quote. An alterations specialist will work closely with you to discuss fit enhancements and personalization options. For event dress shoppers, remember to budget the cost of alterations and bustling when choosing a gown. For example, you might get a great deal on a clearance style that is not the correct size, but complex alterations could cost the amount you saved.

Payment is due at the time of your first fitting. Additional charges apply to rush orders needed within 3 weeks or less. You can pay in installments over time using Affirm.

Please contact your closest Site A Location for an alterations consultation.

content_copy_1154896_270325479.text:
We offer an aisle-ready package to ensure your gown looks flawless for the big day, meticulously prepped down to the last detail.

What’s included: A top-to-bottom review, checking that every bead and appliqué is secure and each layer steamed and prepped to perfection.

Our aisle-ready package is available for both David’s Apparel event dresses and those purchased elsewhere. Ask an alterations artisan.

jcr:content.jcr:title: FAQs: Loyalty Rewards - Site A

content.text: Diamond Loyalty Program is the Site A loyalty program and it's the only one of its kind. Sign up to earn Diamond Points while shopping, receive exclusive discounts and perks, and access gifts including a FREE getaway or honeymoon. For current membership levels and rewards details, see Diamond Loyalty Details.

content_copy_copy_768900100.text: Check out our Diamond Loyalty page to join and begin earning points today!

content_copy_copy_1315839482.text: Anyone! Brides, companion, moms, event guests, promgoers, and partygoers are all welcome.

content_copy.text: Your loyalty number is the phone number you provided at sign up (10 digits).

content_copy_copy.text:
You ll receive one Diamond Point for each dollar spent (online and in store), including shipping.* You can access your Diamond status, card, coupons, and other rewards on your account page.

*For details, see loyalty program terms & conditions and gift details

content_copy_copy_co.text:
When friends and family use your Diamond Number at checkout, they get savings (where applicable) and you earn points toward a FREE getway or honeymoon!* Your Diamond Number is the phone number you registered with and is available on your account page.

*For details, see loyalty program terms & conditions and gift details

title_copy_copy_copy_867835671.jcr:title: At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissimos ducimus.

content_copy_copy_co_1024179773.text: A purchase is eligible for Diamond Points if the purchase occurred after October 1, 2020. If you or one of your friends/family members forgot to add your loyalty number at the time of purchase, you can submit a request for the Diamond Desk to manually add the Diamond Points to your account. You will need a copy of the receipt to verify the purchase. Text VIP to 3820, call 877-714-7766, or email the Diamond Desk through your account dashboard.

content_copy_copy_co_169938898.text: Currently, Diamond Loyalty is available to U.S. customers only. We hope to expand to Canada and Mexico in the future.

title_copy_copy_copy_720118208.jcr:title: How do I cancel my membership?

content_copy_copy_co_787260334.text: To cancel your membership, please contact Diamond Desk by texting VIP to 38201.

content_copy_copy_co_833000679.text: Your Diamond Points for a layaway will be applied to your Diamond Loyalty account once the final payment is submitted. You will receive points for the entire transaction amount, not just for the final payment amount.

title_copy_copy_copy_522789472.jcr:title: How many times can offers be redeemed?

content_copy_copy_co_385959884.text: Each Welcome level offer has unlimited shares. Send to your friends, family, or your entire guest list! Offers at higher levels may be redeemed once. To get credit for purchases made by friends and family, make sure they use your loyalty number at checkout.

content_copy_copy_co_420418389.text: Once you reach Sparkle level, you will be able to schedule a getaway consultation call with one of our Diamond Desk agents to review and book your trip.

content_copy_copy_co_1324097462.text: Even though the order total is $0, our system needs a credit card to process the transaction. Rest assured, you won’t be charged!

content_copy_copy_co_1768448210.text: Click here to view the terms of service of the loyalty program. Click here to view current gift and benefit details for each membership level.

content_copy_copy_co_965260899.text:
You’ll earn Diamond Points as you shop and move up from Welcome (0 to 999 Diamond Points) to Glow (1,000 to 1,999 Diamond Points) to Glitter (2,000 to 2,999 Diamond Points) to Shimmer (3,000 to 3,999 Diamond Points) to Shine (4,000 to 4,999 Diamond Points) to Sparkle (5,000+ Diamond Points). When you reach Sparkle, it’s time to pick your FREE getaway from the available options.

*For details, see loyalty program terms & conditions and gift details

content_copy_copy_co_1742237776.text: Diamond Loyalty is currently available to U.S. customers only.
